requirement_topic.en: KC Mandatory Certification — ECPSA and KATS Scope

summary.en: South Korea requires in-scope electrical appliances and consumer products to obtain KC certification before sale under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, with KATS overseeing the safety framework. Heat-pump HVAC products must be assessed for KC Mark applicability, Korean model registration, Korean-language markings, factory and importer obligations, and adopted KS C IEC standards such as KS C IEC 60335-2-40 for heat-pump and air-conditioning safety.
summary.zh: 韩国依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求范围内电气用品和生活用品在销售前取得KC认证，并由KATS主管安全框架。热泵HVAC产品须评估KC标志适用性、韩国型号登记、韩文标识、工厂和进口商义务，以及KS C IEC 60335-2-40等已采用的热泵和空调安全标准。
summary.zht: 韓國依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求範圍內電氣用品和生活用品在銷售前取得KC認證，並由KATS主管安全框架。熱泵HVAC產品須評估KC標誌適用性、韓國型號登記、韓文標識、工廠和進口商義務，以及KS C IEC 60335-2-40等已採用的熱泵和空調安全標準。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (ECPSA)

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for heat-pump and air-conditioner efficiency and performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. These Chinese documents support domestic compliance but are not recognized as KC certification evidence for South Korea.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为热泵及空调能效和性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。这些中国文件支持国内合规，但不能作为韩国KC认证证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為熱泵及空調能效和性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。這些中國文件支持國內合規，但不能作為韓國KC認證證據。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: CCC is not recognized as KC. Chinese exporters must prepare a South Korea-specific KC certification package, confirm KS C IEC 60335-2-40 alignment, identify in-scope components, provide Korean markings and manuals, and support importer or local representative obligations. The finished product also needs 60 Hz compatibility evidence because China-market 50 Hz compressor designs are not directly compatible with South Korea.
gap.zh: CCC不被视为KC。中国出口商须准备韩国专用KC认证资料，确认与KS C IEC 60335-2-40的一致性，识别范围内部件，提供韩文标识和说明书，并支持进口商或当地代表义务。整机还需要60 Hz兼容性证据，因为中国市场50 Hz压缩机设计不能直接适配韩国。
gap.zht: CCC不被視為KC。中國出口商須準備韓國專用KC認證資料，確認與KS C IEC 60335-2-40的一致性，識別範圍內部件，提供韓文標識和說明書，並支持進口商或當地代表義務。整機還需要60 Hz相容性證據，因為中國市場50 Hz壓縮機設計不能直接適配韓國。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope heat-pump HVAC products and covered electrical components under ECPSA / KC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese domestic-market heat pumps under CCC; not equivalent to KC

source.publisher: Korea Product Safety Management Institute / Safety Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — KC certification and Korean safety documentation are required where ECPSA applies; CCC certificates and GB reports do not replace KC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——ECPSA适用时需要KC认证和韩国安全文件；CCC证书和GB报告不能替代KC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——ECPSA適用時需要KC認證和韓國安全文件；CCC證書和GB報告不能替代KC。
